rulings.Case Title: EDWARD SHORTALL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 17, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Hajoca Corporation¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiff¿s complaint is denied as to requests to strike the amendment substituting it as DOE 40 and taken off calendar as to the remained of the motion as moot in light of the tentative ruling on defendant¿s demurrer. Defendant¿s arguments about the untimeliness and insufficiency of the amendment substituting it as DOE 40 is, in practical effect, a motion for summary judgment either on grounds of the defenses of statute of limitations and laches and should, if at all, be made that way instead of a motion to strike. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD SHORTALL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 17, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Hajoca Corporation¿s demurrer to complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to specify the alleged asbestos-containing product(s) attributable to defendant, and to clarify which alternate entities defendant is allegedly liable and the legal bases for which defendant is allegedly liable for each such alternate entity. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CLINTON BOGAN JR. et al VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION (SUED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Franklina Bogan As Successor-In-Interest To Clinton Bogan, Jr., Deceased, And For Leave To File And Serve Amended Complaint.

No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)
